content.question: What is the current state of Hungarian parliamentary or ministerial debate on whether to restructure, abolish, or reform the 6/8-year gimnázium system, and what equity or efficiency rationales are being advanced or contested by policymakers?
content.reduction_path: Conduct systematic search of Hungarian-language parliamentary records, education ministry reports, and Hungarian policy research outlets (2024–2026) to identify live legislative proposals, position papers by education stakeholders, and public debate on the structural future of age-10/12 gimnázium selection.
